title: ModelPack
description: A curated composition of models assigned to Plandex's internal roles (planner, coder, builder, summarizer, verifier, context loader). Built-in packs include daily, reasoning, strong, cheap, oss, and planner-specific variants.

planner.description: Model used for high-level planning of multi-step tasks.

builder.description: Model used to apply edits and resolve diffs.

summarizer.description: Model used to summarize the conversation.

verifier.description: Model used to verify generated changes.

contextLoader.description: Model used to choose files for auto-load-context.
